import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import requests

class PaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Paper Summarizer")
        self.paper_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.summary = tk.StringVar()
        self.question = tk.StringVar()
        self.answer = tk.StringVar()

        tk.Label(self.root, text="Select Paper:").grid(row=0, column=0)
        tk.Button(self.root, text="Browse", command=self.browse_paper).grid(row=0, column=1)
        tk.Label(self.root, textvariable=self.paper_path).grid(row=0, column=2)

        tk.Button(self.root, text="Generate Summary", command=self.generate_summary).grid(row=1, column=1)

        tk.Label(self.root, text="Summary:").grid(row=2, column=0)
        tk.Text(self.root, width=50, height=10, textvariable=self.summary).grid(row=2, column=1)

        tk.Label(self.root, text="Ask a question:").grid(row=3, column=0)
        tk.Entry(self.root, textvariable=self.question).grid(row=3, column=1)
        tk.Button(self.root, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question).grid(row=3, column=2)

        tk.Label(self.root, text="Answer:").grid(row=4, column=0)
        tk.Text(self.root, width=50, height=5, textvariable=self.answer).grid(row=4, column=1)

    def browse_paper(self):
        path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
        self.paper_path.set(path)

    def generate_summary(self):
        with open(self.paper_path.get(), 'r') as f:
            paper_text = f.read()
        api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
        url = f"https://api.claude.ai/summarize?api_key={api_key}&text={paper_text}"
        response = requests.post(url)
        self.summary.set(response.json()["summary"])

    def ask_question(self):
        api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
        url = f"https://api.claude.ai/answer?api_key={api_key}&question={self.question.get()}&context={self.summary.get()}"
        response = requests.post(url)
        self.answer.set(response.json()["answer"])

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = PaperSummarizer()
    app.run()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import requests

def get_paper():
    paper_path = filedialog.askopenfilename(title="Select Paper", filetypes=[("Text Files", "*.txt;*.pdf;*.docx")])
    paper_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
    paper_entry.insert(0, paper_path)

def generate_summary():
    paper_path = paper_entry.get()
    with open(paper_path, 'r') as f:
        paper_text = f.read()
    api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
    response = requests.post(f"https://api.claude.ai/v1/summarize", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}"}, json={"text": paper_text})
    summary_text = response.json()["summary"]
    summary_label.config(text=summary_text)

def ask_question():
    question = question_entry.get()
    if question:
        api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
        response = requests.post(f"https://api.claude.ai/v1/answer", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}"}, json={"question": question, "context": summary_label.cget("text")})
        answer_text = response.json()["answer"]
        answer_label.config(text=answer_text)
    else:
        answer_label.config(text="Please enter a question")

root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Paper Summarizer")

paper_button = tk.Button(root, text="Select Paper", command=get_paper)
paper_button.pack()

paper_entry = tk.Entry(root, width=50)
paper_entry.pack()

summary_button = tk.Button(root, text="Generate Summary", command=generate_summary)
summary_button.pack()

summary_label = tk.Label(root, text="", wraplength=400)
summary_label.pack()

question_entry = tk.Entry(root, width=50)
question_entry.pack()

ask_button = tk.Button(root, text="Ask Question", command=ask_question)
ask_button.pack()

answer_label = tk.Label(root, text="", wraplength=400)
answer_label.pack()

root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import requests

class PaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Paper Summarizer")
        self.paper_path = None

        self.input_frame = tk.Frame(self.root)
        self.input_frame.pack()

        self.paper_button = tk.Button(self.input_frame, text="Select Paper", command=self.select_paper)
        self.paper_button.pack(side=tk.LEFT)

        self.paper_label = tk.Label(self.input_frame, text="No paper selected")
        self.paper_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(self.root, text="Summarize Paper", command=self.summarize_paper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(self.root, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(self.root, width=50)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(self.root, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(self.root, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(self.root, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

    def select_paper(self):
        self.paper_path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
        self.paper_label.config(text=self.paper_path)

    def summarize_paper(self):
        if self.paper_path:
            with open(self.paper_path, 'r') as f:
                paper_text = f.read()
            api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
            url = f"https://api.claude.ai/summarize?api_key={api_key}"
            headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
            data = {"text": paper_text}
            response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)
            if response.status_code == 200:
                summary = response.json()["summary"]
                self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
                self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)
            else:
                self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
                self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, "Failed to summarize paper")

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get(1.0, tk.END)
        api_key = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY"
        url = f"https://api.claude.ai/answer?api_key={api_key}"
        headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
        data = {"question": question, "context": summary}
        response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)
        if response.status_code == 200:
            answer = response.json()["answer"]
            self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)
        else:
            self.answer_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, "Failed to answer question")

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = PaperSummarizer()
    app.run()

from tkinter import messagebox
import requests

class QuizApp:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Quiz App")
        self.label = tk.Label(root, text="Quiz App")
        self.label.pack()
        self.question_label = tk.Label(root, text="")
        self.question_label.pack()
        self.answer_entry = tk.Entry(root)
        self.answer_entry.pack()
        self.submit_button = tk.Button(root, text="Submit", command=self.submit_answer)
        self.submit_button.pack()
        self.next_button = tk.Button(root, text="Next Question", command=self.get_next_question)
        self.next_button.pack()
        self.score_label = tk.Label(root, text="Score: 0")
        self.score_label.pack()
        self.score = 0
        self.current_question = 0
        self.questions = []
        self.get_questions()

    def get_questions(self):
        response = requests.get("https://opentdb.com/api.php?amount=10&type=multiple")
        data = response.json()
        self.questions = data["results"]
        self.display_question()

    def display_question(self):
        if self.current_question < len(self.questions):
            question = self.questions[self.current_question]
            self.question_label['text'] = question["question"]
        else:
            self.question_label['text'] = "No more questions"

    def submit_answer(self):
        user_answer = self.answer_entry.get()
        correct_answer = self.questions[self.current_question]["correct_answer"]
        if user_answer.lower() == correct_answer.lower():
            self.score += 1
            self.score_label['text'] = f"Score: {self.score}"
            messagebox.showinfo("Correct", "Your answer is correct")
        else:
            messagebox.showinfo("Incorrect", f"Your answer is incorrect. The correct answer is {correct_answer}")
        self.answer_entry.delete(0, tk.END)

    def get_next_question(self):
        self.current_question += 1
        self.display_question()

root = tk.Tk()
app = QuizApp(root)
root.mainloop()
